description: BRL-CAD's MGED geometry editor is open with the 'havoc.g' database — a model of the AH-64 Apache helicopter, one of BRL-CAD's official sample models. The top-level group 'havoc' is drawn in the 3D viewport showing the helicopter wireframe. Export the helicopter geometry to an STL file saved at /home/ga/Documents/BRLCAD/havoc_export.stl. You may use BRL-CAD's geometry conversion tools (accessible from the MGED command window or the terminal) or the File menu to accomplish this.
